candidates.why: Derived metric, not total current assets.

candidates.why: Includes short-term investments, broader than cash and cash equivalents.
Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; preferred over broader cash-plus-investments totals.
Also a valid exact cash-equivalents total, but less preferred than the cleaner primary label.
Broader than cash and cash equivalents because it includes short-term investments.
Not cash; opposite concept.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Dividends Paid & Common Stock Buyback - Net
candidates.why: Financing cash flow item, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the cleaner primary balance-sheet label, with the alternate exact total label second.

candidates.why: Header/group label for current liabilities, but not the reported total.
Component of current liabilities, not the full total.
Component of current liabilities, not the full total.

Component of non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean reported total for short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt. Best match for STD.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, but may be only a component and should not be combined with a clean total to avoid double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose a non-shortlist label because baseline STD should exclude leases. 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' includes capitalized leases here, while 'Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases' is the cleanest lease-excluded balance-sheet measure.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match for TXP.
Includes long-term and short-term together; broader than current taxes payable.
Deferred tax liability, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Deferred Tax & Investment Tax Credits - Long-Term
candidates.why: Deferred/non-current tax item, not current taxes payable.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this exact balance-sheet current tax payable label is clearly the correct mapping.

candidates.why: Exact total net PPE line; preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Gross and qualified; less preferred than net total.
